name: Snippet/prop shadow workaround
description: {#snippet name()} shadows same-named prop in Svelte 5. Workaround: alias with const nameText = $derived(name) before the template uses the snippet.

name: Effect depth guard
description: $effect that reads and writes same state causes infinite loops. Fix: untrack(() => state) for reads + early-return guard to break the cycle.

name: registerSave/registerClear imperative pattern
description: Svelte 5 equivalent of React imperative refs. AnnotationContext uses registerSave/registerClear callbacks passed from parent to child for imperative control.

name: getChildEntities() for tree walks
description: Narrows unknown[] items by type for Manifest/Collection/Range traversal. Canvas→AnnotationPage needs explicit narrowing via isAnnotationPage(). Never iterate items without narrowing.

content: Component decomposition thresholds: moleculeMax 300 lines, organismMax 500 lines (eslint max-lines-feature rule). Extract to sub-components when exceeded.
OSD types use OsdViewer/OsdTileSource aliases in viewerViewHelpers.ts with TYPE_DEBT annotation. No @types/openseadragon available.
ESLint disable comments (<!-- eslint-disable-next-line -->) may not suppress custom rules inside {#if} in Svelte templates. Use ignoreElements config or restructure instead.

name: Cross-view state gap
description: No ViewBus/ViewRegistry exists. appMode.setMode() is the only routing. Global selection.svelte.ts is flat Set<string> with no view scoping. pipeline.svelte.ts (cross-view navigation intent) built but never consumed. Content State URL sync one-way only (selection→URL); parseFromUrl never called on load. Filter infrastructure entirely local to ArchiveView.

Two incompatible search stores: shared/stores/search.svelte.ts (354 lines, substring-only, used by SearchView) and features/search/stores/search.svelte.ts (456 lines, better token scoring, ORPHANED). Search index only rebuilds when SearchView mounts — no mutation-triggered re-indexing. Annotations NOT indexed despite buildIndexEntries supporting it.
resolution: Delete orphaned feature store (salvage scoring algorithm). Wire vault mutations to incremental index updates. Pass annotation bodies to collectIndexEntries.

description: Two disconnected geo systems: MapView (map.svelte.ts, 459 lines) uses custom CSS positioning reading metadata strings with simple equirectangular projection — does NOT use navPlace or Leaflet. GeoEditor (metadata-edit, 227 lines) uses real Leaflet with navPlace. navPlaceService.ts (268 lines) has full GeoJSON + geocoding but MapView doesn't use it.
resolution: Replace MapView internals with Leaflet (reuse GeoEditor's Leaflet init pattern). Wire to navPlaceService for geo operations. Salvage clustering logic from map.svelte.ts.
